revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Sidebar with collapsible lists | name = Buddhism | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:Buddhism|a series]] on | title = [[Buddhism]] | width = {{{width|16.0em}}} | image = [[File:Dharma Wheel (2).svg|90px|link=Dharmachakra]] | bodystyle = border-collapse:collapse; text-align:center | basestyle = background:#FFD068 | listtitlestyle = padding-bottom:0; | liststyle = padding-top:0; background-color:#FDE7B9; border: 2px solid #FDE7B9 | listclass = hlist | expanded = {{{expanded|{{{1|}}}}}}
| aboveclass = hlist | above = * [[Glossary of Buddhism|Glossary]] * [[Index of Buddhism-related articles|Index]] * [[Outline of Buddhism|Outline]]
<!----------------------- History ------------------------->
| list1name = History | list1title = [[History of Buddhism|History]] | list1 = * [[Timeline of Buddhism|Timeline]] * [[The Buddha]] * [[Pre-sectarian Buddhism]] * [[Buddhist councils|Councils]] * [[Silk Road transmission of Buddhism]] * [[Decline of Buddhism in the Indian subcontinent|Decline in the Indian subcontinent]] * [[List of Buddhists|Later Buddhists]] * [[Buddhist modernism]]
<!---------------------- Concepts ------------------------->
| list2name = Concepts | list2title = {{hlist |[[Dharma]] |[[Glossary of Buddhism|Concepts]]}} | list2 = * [[Four Noble Truths]] * [[Noble Eightfold Path]] **[[Dharmachakra|Dharma wheel]] * [[Skandha|Five Aggregates]] * [[Impermanence (Buddhism)|Impermanence]] * [[Duḥkha|Suffering]] * [[Anattā|No-self]] * [[Pratītyasamutpāda|Dependent Origination]] * [[Middle Way]] * [[Maitrī|Mettā]] * [[Śūnyatā|Emptiness]] * [[Buddhist ethics|Morality]] * [[Karma in Buddhism|Karma]] * [[Rebirth (Buddhism)|Rebirth]] * [[Saṃsāra (Buddhism)|Saṃsāra]] * [[Buddhist cosmology|Cosmology]]
<!---------------------- Texts ------------------------>
| list3name = Texts | list3title = [[Buddhist texts]] | list3 = * [[Buddhavacana]] * [[Early Buddhist texts|Early Texts]] * [[Tripiṭaka]] * [[Mahayana sutras|Mahayana Sutras]] * [[Pali Canon|Pāli Canon]] * [[Sanskrit Buddhist literature|Sanskrit literature]] * [[Tibetan Buddhist canon|Tibetan canon]] * [[Chinese Buddhist canon|Chinese canon]] * [[Post-canonical Buddhist texts|Post-canon]]
<!---------------------- Practices ------------------------>
| list4name = Practices | list4title = [[Threefold Training|Practices]] | list4 = * [[Refuge in Buddhism|Three Jewels]] * [[Buddhist paths to liberation]] * [[Five precepts]] * [[Pāramitā|Perfections]] * [[Buddhist meditation|Meditation]] * [[Buddhist philosophy|Philosophical reasoning]] * [[Buddhist devotion|Devotional practices]] * [[Merit (Buddhism)|Merit making]] * [[Anussati|Recollections]] * [[Sati (Buddhism)|Mindfulness]] * [[Prajñā (Buddhism)|Wisdom]] * [[Brahmavihara|Sublime abidings]] * [[Bodhipakkhiyādhammā|Aids to Enlightenment]] * [[Buddhist monasticism|Monasticism]] * [[Householder (Buddhism)|Lay life]] * [[Buddhist music|Buddhist chant]] * [[Buddhist pilgrimage sites|Pilgrimage]] * [[Buddhist vegetarianism|Vegetarianism]]
<!----------------------- Soteriology ------------------------->
| list5name = Nirvana | list5title = [[Nirvana (Buddhism)|Nirvāṇa]] | list5 = * [[Enlightenment in Buddhism|Awakening]] * [[Fruits of the noble path|Four Stages]] * [[Arhat]] * [[Pratyekabuddhayāna]] * [[Bodhisattva]] * [[Buddhahood|Buddha]]
<!--------------------- Traditions ------------------------>
| list6name = Traditions | list6title = [[Schools of Buddhism|Traditions]] | list6 = * [[Theravada|Theravāda]] * [[Pali Canon|Pāli]] * [[Mahayana|Mahāyāna]] * [[Hinayana]] * [[Chinese Buddhism|Chinese]] * [[Vajrayana|Vajrayāna]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism|Tibetan]] * [[Navayana]] * [[Newar Buddhism|Newar]]
<!--------------------- Countries ------------------------>
| list7name = Countries | list7title = [[Buddhism by country]] | list7 = * [[Buddhism in Bhutan|Bhutan]] * [[Buddhism in Brazil|Brazil]] * [[Buddhism in Cambodia|Cambodia]] * [[Buddhism in China|China]] * [[History of Buddhism in India|India]] * [[Buddhism in Indonesia|Indonesia]] * [[Buddhism in Japan|Japan]] * [[Korean Buddhism|Korea]] * [[Buddhism in Laos|Laos]] * [[Buddhism in Malaysia|Malaysia]] * [[Buddhism in Mongolia|Mongolia]] * [[Buddhism in Myanmar|Myanmar]] * [[Buddhism in New Zealand|New Zealand]] * [[Buddhism in Russia|Russia]] * [[Buddhism in Singapore|Singapore]] * [[Buddhism in the United States|US]] * [[Buddhism in Sri Lanka|Sri Lanka]] * [[Buddhism in Taiwan|Taiwan]] * [[Buddhism in Thailand|Thailand]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism|Tibet]] * [[Buddhism in Vietnam|Vietnam]]
| belowclass = hlist | below = * {{Portal-inline|Buddhism|size=tiny}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!---Place category links on the /doc sub-page; language links go to Wikidata, thank you!---> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Sidebar with collapsible lists | name = Buddhism | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:Buddhism|a series]] on | title = [[Buddhism]] | width = {{{width|16.0em}}} | image = [[File:Dharma Wheel (2).svg|90px|link=Dharmachakra]] | bodystyle = border-collapse:collapse; text-align:center | basestyle = background:#FFD068 | listtitlestyle = padding-bottom:0; | liststyle = padding-top:0; background-color:#FDE7B9; border: 2px solid #FDE7B9 | listclass = hlist | expanded = {{{expanded|{{{1|}}}}}}
| aboveclass = hlist | above = * [[Glossary of Buddhism|Glossary]] * [[Index of Buddhism-related articles|Index]] * [[Outline of Buddhism|Outline]]
<!----------------------- History ------------------------->
| list1name = History | list1title = [[History of Buddhism|History]] | list1 = * [[Timeline of Buddhism|Timeline]] * [[The Buddha]] * [[Pre-sectarian Buddhism]] * [[Buddhist councils|Councils]] * [[Silk Road transmission of Buddhism]] * [[Decline of Buddhism in the Indian subcontinent|Decline in the Indian subcontinent]] * [[List of Buddhists|Later Buddhists]] * [[Buddhist modernism]]
<!---------------------- Concepts ------------------------->
| list2name = Concepts | list2title = {{hlist |[[Dharma]] |[[Glossary of Buddhism|Concepts]]}} | list2 = * [[Four Noble Truths]] * [[Noble Eightfold Path]] **[[Dharmachakra|Dharma wheel]] * [[Skandha|Five Aggregates]] * [[Impermanence (Buddhism)|Impermanence]] * [[Duḥkha|Suffering]] * [[Anattā|No-self]] * [[Pratītyasamutpāda|Dependent Origination]] * [[Middle Way]] * [[Maitrī|Mettā]] * [[Śūnyatā|Emptiness]] * [[Buddhist ethics|Morality]] * [[Karma in Buddhism|Karma]] * [[Rebirth (Buddhism)|Rebirth]] * [[Saṃsāra (Buddhism)|Saṃsāra]] * [[Buddhist cosmology|Cosmology]]
<!---------------------- Texts ------------------------>
| list3name = Texts | list3title = [[Buddhist texts]] | list3 = * [[Buddhavacana]] * [[Early Buddhist texts|Early Texts]] * [[Tripiṭaka]] * [[Mahayana sutras|Mahayana Sutras]] * [[Pali Canon|Pāli Canon]] * [[Sanskrit Buddhist literature|Sanskrit literature]] * [[Tibetan Buddhist canon|Tibetan canon]] * [[Chinese Buddhist canon|Chinese canon]] * [[Post-canonical Buddhist texts|Post-canon]]
<!---------------------- Practices ------------------------>
| list4name = Practices | list4title = [[Threefold Training|Practices]] | list4 = * [[Refuge in Buddhism|Three Jewels]] * [[Buddhist paths to liberation]] * [[Five precepts]] * [[Pāramitā|Perfections]] * [[Buddhist meditation|Meditation]] * [[Buddhist philosophy|Philosophical reasoning]] * [[Buddhist devotion|Devotional practices]] * [[Merit (Buddhism)|Merit making]] * [[Anussati|Recollections]] * [[Sati (Buddhism)|Mindfulness]] * [[Prajñā (Buddhism)|Wisdom]] * [[Brahmavihara|Sublime abidings]] * [[Bodhipakkhiyādhammā|Aids to Enlightenment]] * [[Buddhist monasticism|Monasticism]] * [[Householder (Buddhism)|Lay life]] * [[Buddhist music|Buddhist chant]] * [[Buddhist pilgrimage sites|Pilgrimage]] * [[Buddhist vegetarianism|Vegetarianism]]
<!----------------------- Soteriology ------------------------->
| list5name = Nirvana | list5title = [[Nirvana (Buddhism)|Nirvāṇa]] | list5 = * [[Enlightenment in Buddhism|Awakening]] * [[Fruits of the noble path|Four Stages]] * [[Arhat]] * [[Pratyekabuddhayāna]] * [[Bodhisattva]] * [[Buddhahood|Buddha]]
<!--------------------- Traditions ------------------------>
| list6name = Traditions | list6title = [[Schools of Buddhism|Traditions]] | list6 = * [[Theravada|Theravāda]] * [[Pali Canon|Pāli]] * [[Mahayana|Mahāyāna]] * [[Hinayana]] * [[Chinese Buddhism|Chinese]] * [[Vajrayana|Vajrayāna]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism|Tibetan]] * [[Navayana]] * [[Newar Buddhism|Newar]]
<!--------------------- Countries ------------------------>
| list7name = Countries | list7title = [[Buddhism by country]] | list7 = * [[Buddhism in Bhutan|Bhutan]] * [[Buddhism in Brazil|Brazil]] * [[Buddhism in Cambodia|Cambodia]] * [[Buddhism in China|China]] * [[History of Buddhism in India|India]] * [[Buddhism in Indonesia|Indonesia]] * [[Buddhism in Japan|Japan]] * [[Korean Buddhism|Korea]] * [[Buddhism in Laos|Laos]] * [[Buddhism in Malaysia|Malaysia]] * [[Buddhism in Mongolia|Mongolia]] * [[Buddhism in Myanmar|Myanmar]] * [[Buddhism in New Zealand|New Zealand]] * [[Buddhism in Russia|Russia]] * [[Buddhism in Singapore|Singapore]] * [[Buddhism in the United States|US]] * [[Buddhism in Sri Lanka|Sri Lanka]] * [[Buddhism in Taiwan|Taiwan]] * [[Buddhism in Thailand|Thailand]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism|Tibet]] * [[Buddhism in Vietnam|Vietnam]]
| belowclass = hlist | below = * {{Portal-inline|Buddhism|size=tiny}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!---Place category links on the /doc sub-page; language links go to Wikidata, thank you!--->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Sidebar with collapsible lists | name = Buddhism | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:Buddhism|a series]] on | title = [[Buddhism]] | width = {{{width|16.0em}}} | image = [[File:Dharma Wheel (2).svg|90px|link=Dharmachakra]] | bodystyle = border-collapse:collapse; text-align:center | basestyle = background:#FFD068 | listtitlestyle = padding-bottom:0; | liststyle = padding-top:0; background-color:#FDE7B9; border: 2px solid #FDE7B9 | listclass = hlist | expanded = {{{expanded|{{{1|}}}}}}
| aboveclass = hlist | above = * [[Glossary of Buddhism|Glossary]] * [[Index of Buddhism-related articles|Index]] * [[Outline of Buddhism|Outline]]
<!----------------------- History ------------------------->
| list1name = History | list1title = [[History of Buddhism|History]] | list1 = * [[Timeline of Buddhism|Timeline]] * [[The Buddha]] * [[Pre-sectarian Buddhism]] * [[Buddhist councils|Councils]] * [[Silk Road transmission of Buddhism]] * [[Decline of Buddhism in the Indian subcontinent|Decline in the Indian subcontinent]] * [[List of Buddhists|Later Buddhists]] * [[Buddhist modernism]]
<!---------------------- Concepts ------------------------->
| list2name = Concepts | list2title = {{hlist |[[Dharma]] |[[Glossary of Buddhism|Concepts]]}} | list2 = * [[Four Noble Truths]] * [[Noble Eightfold Path]] **[[Dharmachakra|Dharma wheel]] * [[Skandha|Five Aggregates]] * [[Impermanence (Buddhism)|Impermanence]] * [[Duḥkha|Suffering]] * [[Anattā|No-self]] * [[Pratītyasamutpāda|Dependent Origination]] * [[Middle Way]] * [[Maitrī|Mettā]] * [[Śūnyatā|Emptiness]] * [[Buddhist ethics|Morality]] * [[Karma in Buddhism|Karma]] * [[Rebirth (Buddhism)|Rebirth]] * [[Saṃsāra (Buddhism)|Saṃsāra]] * [[Buddhist cosmology|Cosmology]]
<!---------------------- Texts ------------------------>
| list3name = Texts | list3title = [[Buddhist texts]] | list3 = * [[Buddhavacana]] * [[Early Buddhist texts|Early Texts]] * [[Tripiṭaka]] * [[Mahayana sutras|Mahayana Sutras]] * [[Pali Canon|Pāli Canon]] * [[Sanskrit Buddhist literature|Sanskrit literature]] * [[Tibetan Buddhist canon|Tibetan canon]] * [[Chinese Buddhist canon|Chinese canon]] * [[Post-canonical Buddhist texts|Post-canon]]
<!---------------------- Practices ------------------------>
| list4name = Practices | list4title = [[Threefold Training|Practices]] | list4 = * [[Refuge in Buddhism|Three Jewels]] * [[Buddhist paths to liberation]] * [[Five precepts]] * [[Pāramitā|Perfections]] * [[Buddhist meditation|Meditation]] * [[Buddhist philosophy|Philosophical reasoning]] * [[Buddhist devotion|Devotional practices]] * [[Merit (Buddhism)|Merit making]] * [[Anussati|Recollections]] * [[Sati (Buddhism)|Mindfulness]] * [[Prajñā (Buddhism)|Wisdom]] * [[Brahmavihara|Sublime abidings]] * [[Bodhipakkhiyādhammā|Aids to Enlightenment]] * [[Buddhist monasticism|Monasticism]] * [[Householder (Buddhism)|Lay life]] * [[Buddhist music|Buddhist chant]] * [[Buddhist pilgrimage sites|Pilgrimage]] * [[Buddhist vegetarianism|Vegetarianism]]
<!----------------------- Soteriology ------------------------->
| list5name = Nirvana | list5title = [[Nirvana (Buddhism)|Nirvāṇa]] | list5 = * [[Enlightenment in Buddhism|Awakening]] * [[Fruits of the noble path|Four Stages]] * [[Arhat]] * [[Pratyekabuddhayāna]] * [[Bodhisattva]] * [[Buddhahood|Buddha]]
<!--------------------- Traditions ------------------------>
| list6name = Traditions | list6title = [[Schools of Buddhism|Traditions]] | list6 = * [[Theravada|Theravāda]] * [[Pali Canon|Pāli]] * [[Mahayana|Mahāyāna]] * [[Hinayana]] * [[Chinese Buddhism|Chinese]] * [[Vajrayana|Vajrayāna]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism|Tibetan]] * [[Navayana]] * [[Newar Buddhism|Newar]]
<!--------------------- Countries ------------------------>
| list7name = Countries | list7title = [[Buddhism by country]] | list7 = * [[Buddhism in Bhutan|Bhutan]] * [[Buddhism in Brazil|Brazil]] * [[Buddhism in Cambodia|Cambodia]] * [[Buddhism in China|China]] * [[History of Buddhism in India|India]] * [[Buddhism in Indonesia|Indonesia]] * [[Buddhism in Japan|Japan]] * [[Korean Buddhism|Korea]] * [[Buddhism in Laos|Laos]] * [[Buddhism in Malaysia|Malaysia]] * [[Buddhism in Mongolia|Mongolia]] * [[Buddhism in Myanmar|Myanmar]] * [[Buddhism in New Zealand|New Zealand]] * [[Buddhism in Russia|Russia]] * [[Buddhism in Singapore|Singapore]] * [[Buddhism in the United States|US]] * [[Buddhism in Sri Lanka|Sri Lanka]] * [[Buddhism in Taiwan|Taiwan]] * [[Buddhism in Thailand|Thailand]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism|Tibet]] * [[Buddhism in Vietnam|Vietnam]]
| belowclass = hlist | below = * {{Portal-inline|Buddhism|size=tiny}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!---Place category links on the /doc sub-page; language links go to Wikidata, thank you!--->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Sidebar with collapsible lists | name = Buddhism | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:Buddhism|a series]] on | title = [[Buddhism]] | width = {{{width|16.0em}}} | image = [[File:Dharma Wheel (2).svg|90px|link=Dharmachakra]] | bodystyle = border-collapse:collapse; text-align:center | basestyle = background:#FFD068 | listtitlestyle = padding-bottom:0; | liststyle = padding-top:0; background-color:#FDE7B9; border: 2px solid #FDE7B9 | listclass = hlist | expanded = {{{expanded|{{{1|}}}}}}
| aboveclass = hlist | above = * [[Glossary of Buddhism|Glossary]] * [[Index of Buddhism-related articles|Index]] * [[Outline of Buddhism|Outline]]
<!----------------------- History ------------------------->
| list1name = History | list1title = [[History of Buddhism|History]] | list1 = * [[Timeline of Buddhism|Timeline]] * [[The Buddha]] * [[Pre-sectarian Buddhism]] * [[Buddhist councils|Councils]] * [[Silk Road transmission of Buddhism]] * [[Decline of Buddhism in the Indian subcontinent|Decline in the Indian subcontinent]] * [[List of Buddhists|Later Buddhists]] * [[Buddhist modernism]]
<!---------------------- Concepts ------------------------->
| list2name = Concepts | list2title = {{hlist |[[Dharma]] |[[Glossary of Buddhism|Concepts]]}} | list2 = * [[Four Noble Truths]] * [[Noble Eightfold Path]] **[[Dharmachakra|Dharma wheel]] * [[Skandha|Five Aggregates]] * [[Impermanence (Buddhism)|Impermanence]] * [[Duḥkha|Suffering]] * [[Anattā|No-self]] * [[Pratītyasamutpāda|Dependent Origination]] * [[Middle Way]] * [[Maitrī|Mettā]] * [[Śūnyatā|Emptiness]] * [[Buddhist ethics|Morality]] * [[Karma in Buddhism|Karma]] * [[Rebirth (Buddhism)|Rebirth]] * [[Saṃsāra (Buddhism)|Saṃsāra]] * [[Buddhist cosmology|Cosmology]]
<!---------------------- Texts ------------------------>
| list3name = Texts | list3title = [[Buddhist texts]] | list3 = * [[Buddhavacana]] * [[Early Buddhist texts|Early Texts]] * [[Tripiṭaka]] * [[Mahayana sutras|Mahayana Sutras]] * [[Pali Canon|Pāli Canon]] * [[Sanskrit Buddhist literature|Sanskrit literature]] * [[Tibetan Buddhist canon|Tibetan canon]] * [[Chinese Buddhist canon|Chinese canon]] * [[Post-canonical Buddhist texts|Post-canon]]
<!---------------------- Practices ------------------------>
| list4name = Practices | list4title = [[Threefold Training|Practices]] | list4 = * [[Refuge in Buddhism|Three Jewels]] * [[Buddhist paths to liberation]] * [[Five precepts]] * [[Pāramitā|Perfections]] * [[Buddhist meditation|Meditation]] * [[Buddhist philosophy|Philosophical reasoning]] * [[Buddhist devotion|Devotional practices]] * [[Merit (Buddhism)|Merit making]] * [[Anussati|Recollections]] * [[Sati (Buddhism)|Mindfulness]] * [[Prajñā (Buddhism)|Wisdom]] * [[Brahmavihara|Sublime abidings]] * [[Bodhipakkhiyādhammā|Aids to Enlightenment]] * [[Buddhist monasticism|Monasticism]] * [[Householder (Buddhism)|Lay life]] * [[Buddhist music|Buddhist chant]] * [[Buddhist pilgrimage sites|Pilgrimage]] * [[Buddhist vegetarianism|Vegetarianism]]
<!----------------------- Soteriology ------------------------->
| list5name = Nirvana | list5title = [[Nirvana (Buddhism)|Nirvāṇa]] | list5 = * [[Enlightenment in Buddhism|Awakening]] * [[Fruits of the noble path|Four Stages]] * [[Arhat]] * [[Pratyekabuddhayāna]] * [[Bodhisattva]] * [[Buddhahood|Buddha]]
<!--------------------- Traditions ------------------------>
| list6name = Traditions | list6title = [[Schools of Buddhism|Traditions]] | list6 = * [[Theravada|Theravāda]] * [[Pali Canon|Pāli]] * [[Mahayana|Mahāyāna]] * [[Hinayana]] * [[Chinese Buddhism|Chinese]] * [[Vajrayana|Vajrayāna]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism|Tibetan]] * [[Navayana]] * [[Newar Buddhism|Newar]]
<!--------------------- Countries ------------------------>
| list7name = Countries | list7title = [[Buddhism by country]] | list7 = * [[Buddhism in Bhutan|Bhutan]] * [[Buddhism in Brazil|Brazil]] * [[Buddhism in Cambodia|Cambodia]] * [[Buddhism in China|China]] * [[History of Buddhism in India|India]] * [[Buddhism in Indonesia|Indonesia]] * [[Buddhism in Japan|Japan]] * [[Korean Buddhism|Korea]] * [[Buddhism in Laos|Laos]] * [[Buddhism in Malaysia|Malaysia]] * [[Buddhism in Mongolia|Mongolia]] * [[Buddhism in Myanmar|Myanmar]] * [[Buddhism in New Zealand|New Zealand]] * [[Buddhism in Russia|Russia]] * [[Buddhism in Singapore|Singapore]] * [[Buddhism in the United States|US]] * [[Buddhism in Sri Lanka|Sri Lanka]] * [[Buddhism in Taiwan|Taiwan]] * [[Buddhism in Thailand|Thailand]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism|Tibet]] * [[Buddhism in Vietnam|Vietnam]]
| belowclass = hlist | below = * {{Portal-inline|Buddhism|size=tiny}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!---Place category links on the /doc sub-page; language links go to Wikidata, thank you!--->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Sidebar with collapsible lists | name = Buddhism | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:Buddhism|a series]] on | title = [[Buddhism]] | width = {{{width|16.0em}}} | image = [[File:Dharma Wheel (2).svg|90px|link=Dharmachakra]] | bodystyle = border-collapse:collapse; text-align:center | basestyle = background:#FFD068 | listtitlestyle = padding-bottom:0; | liststyle = padding-top:0; background-color:#FDE7B9; border: 2px solid #FDE7B9 | listclass = hlist | expanded = {{{expanded|{{{1|}}}}}}
| aboveclass = hlist | above = * [[Glossary of Buddhism|Glossary]] * [[Index of Buddhism-related articles|Index]] * [[Outline of Buddhism|Outline]]
<!----------------------- History ------------------------->
| list1name = History | list1title = [[History of Buddhism|History]] | list1 = * [[Timeline of Buddhism|Timeline]] * [[The Buddha]] * [[Pre-sectarian Buddhism]] * [[Buddhist councils|Councils]] * [[Silk Road transmission of Buddhism]] * [[Decline of Buddhism in the Indian subcontinent|Decline in the Indian subcontinent]] * [[List of Buddhists|Later Buddhists]] * [[Buddhist modernism]]
<!---------------------- Concepts ------------------------->
| list2name = Concepts | list2title = {{hlist |[[Dharma]] |[[Glossary of Buddhism|Concepts]]}} | list2 = * [[Four Noble Truths]] * [[Noble Eightfold Path]] **[[Dharmachakra|Dharma wheel]] * [[Skandha|Five Aggregates]] * [[Impermanence (Buddhism)|Impermanence]] * [[Duḥkha|Suffering]] * [[Anattā|No-self]] * [[Pratītyasamutpāda|Dependent Origination]] * [[Middle Way]] * [[Maitrī|Mettā]] * [[Śūnyatā|Emptiness]] * [[Buddhist ethics|Morality]] * [[Karma in Buddhism|Karma]] * [[Rebirth (Buddhism)|Rebirth]] * [[Saṃsāra (Buddhism)|Saṃsāra]] * [[Buddhist cosmology|Cosmology]]
<!---------------------- Texts ------------------------>
| list3name = Texts | list3title = [[Buddhist texts]] | list3 = * [[Buddhavacana]] * [[Early Buddhist texts|Early Texts]] * [[Tripiṭaka]] * [[Mahayana sutras|Mahayana Sutras]] * [[Pali Canon|Pāli Canon]] * [[Sanskrit Buddhist literature|Sanskrit literature]] * [[Tibetan Buddhist canon|Tibetan canon]] * [[Chinese Buddhist canon|Chinese canon]] * [[Post-canonical Buddhist texts|Post-canon]]
<!---------------------- Practices ------------------------>
| list4name = Practices | list4title = [[Threefold Training|Practices]] | list4 = * [[Refuge in Buddhism|Three Jewels]] * [[Buddhist paths to liberation]] * [[Five precepts]] * [[Pāramitā|Perfections]] * [[Buddhist meditation|Meditation]] * [[Buddhist philosophy|Philosophical reasoning]] * [[Buddhist devotion|Devotional practices]] * [[Merit (Buddhism)|Merit making]] * [[Anussati|Recollections]] * [[Sati (Buddhism)|Mindfulness]] * [[Prajñā (Buddhism)|Wisdom]] * [[Brahmavihara|Sublime abidings]] * [[Bodhipakkhiyādhammā|Aids to Enlightenment]] * [[Buddhist monasticism|Monasticism]] * [[Householder (Buddhism)|Lay life]] * [[Buddhist music|Buddhist chant]] * [[Buddhist pilgrimage sites|Pilgrimage]] * [[Buddhist vegetarianism|Vegetarianism]]
<!----------------------- Soteriology ------------------------->
| list5name = Nirvana | list5title = [[Nirvana (Buddhism)|Nirvāṇa]] | list5 = * [[Enlightenment in Buddhism|Awakening]] * [[Fruits of the noble path|Four Stages]] * [[Arhat]] * [[Pratyekabuddhayāna]] * [[Bodhisattva]] * [[Buddhahood|Buddha]]
<!--------------------- Traditions ------------------------>
| list6name = Traditions | list6title = [[Schools of Buddhism|Traditions]] | list6 = * [[Theravada|Theravāda]] * [[Pali Canon|Pāli]] * [[Mahayana|Mahāyāna]] * [[Hinayana]] * [[Chinese Buddhism|Chinese]] * [[Vajrayana|Vajrayāna]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism|Tibetan]] * [[Navayana]] * [[Newar Buddhism|Newar]]
<!--------------------- Countries ------------------------>
| list7name = Countries | list7title = [[Buddhism by country]] | list7 = * [[Buddhism in Bhutan|Bhutan]] * [[Buddhism in Brazil|Brazil]] * [[Buddhism in Cambodia|Cambodia]] * [[Buddhism in China|China]] * [[History of Buddhism in India|India]] * [[Buddhism in Indonesia|Indonesia]] * [[Buddhism in Japan|Japan]] * [[Korean Buddhism|Korea]] * [[Buddhism in Laos|Laos]] * [[Buddhism in Malaysia|Malaysia]] * [[Buddhism in Mongolia|Mongolia]] * [[Buddhism in Myanmar|Myanmar]] * [[Buddhism in New Zealand|New Zealand]] * [[Buddhism in Russia|Russia]] * [[Buddhism in Singapore|Singapore]] * [[Buddhism in the United States|US]] * [[Buddhism in Sri Lanka|Sri Lanka]] * [[Buddhism in Taiwan|Taiwan]] * [[Buddhism in Thailand|Thailand]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism|Tibet]] * [[Buddhism in Vietnam|Vietnam]]
| belowclass = hlist | below = * {{Portal-inline|Buddhism|size=tiny}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!---Place category links on the /doc sub-page; language links go to Wikidata, thank you!--->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{Sidebar with collapsible lists | name = Buddhism | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:Buddhism|a series]] on | title = [[Buddhism]] | width = {{{width|16.0em}}} | image = [[File:Dharma Wheel (2).svg|90px|link=Dharmachakra]] | bodystyle = border-collapse:collapse; text-align:center | basestyle = background:#FFD068 | listtitlestyle = padding-bottom:0; | liststyle = padding-top:0; background-color:#FDE7B9; border: 2px solid #FDE7B9 | listclass = hlist | expanded = {{{expanded|{{{1|}}}}}}
| aboveclass = hlist | above = * [[Glossary of Buddhism|Glossary]] * [[Index of Buddhism-related articles|Index]] * [[Outline of Buddhism|Outline]]
<!----------------------- History ------------------------->
| list1name = History | list1title = [[History of Buddhism|History]] | list1 = * [[Timeline of Buddhism|Timeline]] * [[The Buddha]] * [[Pre-sectarian Buddhism]] * [[Buddhist councils|Councils]] * [[Silk Road transmission of Buddhism]] * [[Decline of Buddhism in the Indian subcontinent|Decline in the Indian subcontinent]] * [[List of Buddhists|Later Buddhists]] * [[Buddhist modernism]]
<!---------------------- Concepts ------------------------->
| list2name = Concepts | list2title = {{hlist |[[Dharma]] |[[Glossary of Buddhism|Concepts]]}} | list2 = * [[Four Noble Truths]] * [[Noble Eightfold Path]] **[[Dharmachakra|Dharma wheel]] * [[Skandha|Five Aggregates]] * [[Impermanence (Buddhism)|Impermanence]] * [[Duḥkha|Suffering]] * [[Anattā|No-self]] * [[Pratītyasamutpāda|Dependent Origination]] * [[Middle Way]] * [[Maitrī|Mettā]] * [[Śūnyatā|Emptiness]] * [[Buddhist ethics|Morality]] * [[Karma in Buddhism|Karma]] * [[Rebirth (Buddhism)|Rebirth]] * [[Saṃsāra (Buddhism)|Saṃsāra]] * [[Buddhist cosmology|Cosmology]]
<!---------------------- Texts ------------------------>
| list3name = Texts | list3title = [[Buddhist texts]] | list3 = * [[Buddhavacana]] * [[Early Buddhist texts|Early Texts]] * [[Tripiṭaka]] * [[Mahayana sutras|Mahayana Sutras]] * [[Pali Canon|Pāli Canon]] * [[Sanskrit Buddhist literature|Sanskrit literature]] * [[Tibetan Buddhist canon|Tibetan canon]] * [[Chinese Buddhist canon|Chinese canon]] * [[Post-canonical Buddhist texts|Post-canon]]
<!---------------------- Practices ------------------------>
| list4name = Practices | list4title = [[Threefold Training|Practices]] | list4 = * [[Refuge in Buddhism|Three Jewels]] * [[Buddhist paths to liberation]] * [[Five precepts]] * [[Pāramitā|Perfections]] * [[Buddhist meditation|Meditation]] * [[Buddhist philosophy|Philosophical reasoning]] * [[Buddhist devotion|Devotional practices]] * [[Merit (Buddhism)|Merit making]] * [[Anussati|Recollections]] * [[Sati (Buddhism)|Mindfulness]] * [[Prajñā (Buddhism)|Wisdom]] * [[Brahmavihara|Sublime abidings]] * [[Bodhipakkhiyādhammā|Aids to Enlightenment]] * [[Buddhist monasticism|Monasticism]] * [[Householder (Buddhism)|Lay life]] * [[Buddhist music|Buddhist chant]] * [[Buddhist pilgrimage sites|Pilgrimage]] * [[Buddhist vegetarianism|Vegetarianism]]
<!----------------------- Soteriology ------------------------->
| list5name = Nirvana | list5title = [[Nirvana (Buddhism)|Nirvāṇa]] | list5 = * [[Enlightenment in Buddhism|Awakening]] * [[Fruits of the noble path|Four Stages]] * [[Arhat]] * [[Pratyekabuddhayāna]] * [[Bodhisattva]] * [[Buddhahood|Buddha]]
<!--------------------- Traditions ------------------------>
| list6name = Traditions | list6title = [[Schools of Buddhism|Traditions]] | list6 = * [[Theravada|Theravāda]] * [[Pali Canon|Pāli]] * [[Mahayana|Mahāyāna]] * [[Hinayana]] * [[Chinese Buddhism|Chinese]] * [[Vajrayana|Vajrayāna]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism|Tibetan]] * [[Navayana]] * [[Newar Buddhism|Newar]]
<!--------------------- Countries ------------------------>
| list7name = Countries | list7title = [[Buddhism by country]] | list7 = * [[Buddhism in Bhutan|Bhutan]] * [[Buddhism in Brazil|Brazil]] * [[Buddhism in Cambodia|Cambodia]] * [[Buddhism in China|China]] * [[History of Buddhism in India|India]] * [[Buddhism in Indonesia|Indonesia]] * [[Buddhism in Japan|Japan]] * [[Korean Buddhism|Korea]] * [[Buddhism in Laos|Laos]] * [[Buddhism in Malaysia|Malaysia]] * [[Buddhism in Mongolia|Mongolia]] * [[Buddhism in Myanmar|Myanmar]] * [[Buddhism in New Zealand|New Zealand]] * [[Buddhism in Russia|Russia]] * [[Buddhism in Singapore|Singapore]] * [[Buddhism in the United States|US]] * [[Buddhism in Sri Lanka|Sri Lanka]] * [[Buddhism in Taiwan|Taiwan]] * [[Buddhism in Thailand|Thailand]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism|Tibet]] * [[Buddhism in Vietnam|Vietnam]]
| belowclass = hlist | below = * {{Portal-inline|Buddhism|size=tiny}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!---Place category links on the /doc sub-page; language links go to Wikidata, thank you!--->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Sidebar with collapsible lists | name = Buddhism | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:Buddhism|a series]] on | title = [[Buddhism]] | width = {{{width|16.0em}}} | image = [[File:Dharma Wheel (2).svg|90px|link=Dharmachakra]] | bodystyle = border-collapse:collapse; text-align:center | basestyle = background:#FFD068 | listtitlestyle = padding-bottom:0; | liststyle = padding-top:0; background-color:#FDE7B9; border: 2px solid #FDE7B9 | listclass = hlist | expanded = {{{expanded|{{{1|}}}}}}
| aboveclass = hlist | above = * [[Glossary of Buddhism|Glossary]] * [[Index of Buddhism-related articles|Index]] * [[Outline of Buddhism|Outline]]
<!----------------------- History ------------------------->
| list1name = History | list1title = [[History of Buddhism|History]] | list1 = * [[Timeline of Buddhism|Timeline]] * [[The Buddha]] * [[Pre-sectarian Buddhism]] * [[Buddhist councils|Councils]] * [[Silk Road transmission of Buddhism]] * [[Decline of Buddhism in the Indian subcontinent|Decline in the Indian subcontinent]] * [[List of Buddhists|Later Buddhists]] * [[Buddhist modernism]] <!---------------------- Concepts ------------------------->
| list2name = Concepts | list2title = {{hlist |[[Dharma]] |[[Glossary of Buddhism|Concepts]]}} | list2 = * [[Four Noble Truths]] * [[Noble Eightfold Path]] **[[Dharmachakra|Dharma wheel]] * [[Skandha|Five Aggregates]] * [[Impermanence (Buddhism)|Impermanence]] * [[Duḥkha|Suffering]] * [[Anattā|No-self]] * [[Pratītyasamutpāda|Dependent Origination]] * [[Middle Way]] * [[Maitrī|Mettā]] * [[Śūnyatā|Emptiness]] * [[Buddhist ethics|Morality]] * [[Karma in Buddhism|Karma]] * [[Rebirth (Buddhism)|Rebirth]] * [[Saṃsāra (Buddhism)|Saṃsāra]] * [[Buddhist cosmology|Cosmology]]
<!---------------------- Texts ------------------------>
| list3name = Texts | list3title = [[Buddhist texts]] | list3 = * [[Buddhavacana]] * [[Early Buddhist texts|Early Texts]] * [[Tripiṭaka]] * [[Mahayana sutras|Mahayana Sutras]] * [[Pali Canon|Pāli Canon]] * [[Sanskrit Buddhist literature|Sanskrit literature]] * [[Tibetan Buddhist canon|Tibetan canon]] * [[Chinese Buddhist canon|Chinese canon]] * [[Post-canonical Buddhist texts|Post-canon]]
<!---------------------- Practices ------------------------>
| list4name = Practices | list4title = [[Threefold Training|Practices]] | list4 = * [[Refuge in Buddhism|Three Jewels]] * [[Buddhist paths to liberation]] * [[Five precepts]] * [[Pāramitā|Perfections]] * [[Buddhist meditation|Meditation]] * [[Buddhist philosophy|Philosophical reasoning]] * [[Buddhist devotion|Devotional practices]] * [[Merit (Buddhism)|Merit making]] * [[Anussati|Recollections]] * [[Sati (Buddhism)|Mindfulness]] * [[Prajñā (Buddhism)|Wisdom]] * [[Brahmavihara|Sublime abidings]] * [[Bodhipakkhiyādhammā|Aids to Enlightenment]] * [[Buddhist monasticism|Monasticism]] * [[Householder (Buddhism)|Lay life]] * [[Buddhist music|Buddhist chant]] * [[Buddhist pilgrimage sites|Pilgrimage]] * [[Buddhist vegetarianism|Vegetarianism]] <!----------------------- Soteriology ------------------------->
| list5name = Nirvana | list5title = [[Nirvana (Buddhism)|Nirvāṇa]] | list5 = * [[Enlightenment in Buddhism|Awakening]] * [[Fruits of the noble path|Four Stages]] * [[Arhat]] * [[Pratyekabuddhayāna]] * [[Bodhisattva]] * [[Buddhahood|Buddha]]
<!--------------------- Traditions ------------------------>
| list6name = Traditions | list6title = [[Schools of Buddhism|Traditions]] | list6 = * [[Theravada|Theravāda]] * [[Pali Canon|Pāli]] * [[Mahayana|Mahāyāna]] * [[Hinayana]] * [[Chinese Buddhism|Chinese]] * [[Vajrayana|Vajrayāna]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism|Tibetan]] * [[Navayana]] * [[Newar Buddhism|Newar]]
<!--------------------- Countries ------------------------>
| list7name = Countries | list7title = [[Buddhism by country]] | list7 = * [[Buddhism in Bhutan|Bhutan]] * [[Buddhism in Brazil|Brazil]] * [[Buddhism in Cambodia|Cambodia]] * [[Buddhism in China|China]] * [[History of Buddhism in India|India]] * [[Buddhism in Indonesia|Indonesia]] * [[Buddhism in Japan|Japan]] * [[Korean Buddhism|Korea]] * [[Buddhism in Laos|Laos]] * [[Buddhism in Malaysia|Malaysia]] * [[Buddhism in Mongolia|Mongolia]] * [[Buddhism in Myanmar|Myanmar]] * [[Buddhism in New Zealand|New Zealand]] * [[Buddhism in Russia|Russia]] * [[Buddhism in Singapore|Singapore]] * [[Buddhism in the United States|US]] * [[Buddhism in Sri Lanka|Sri Lanka]] * [[Buddhism in Taiwan|Taiwan]] * [[Buddhism in Thailand|Thailand]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism|Tibet]] * [[Buddhism in Vietnam|Vietnam]]
| belowclass = hlist | below = * {{Portal-inline|Buddhism|size=tiny}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!---Place category links on the /doc sub-page; language links go to Wikidata, thank you!--->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Sidebar with collapsible lists | name = Buddhism | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:Buddhism|a series]] on | title = [[Buddhism]] | width = {{{width|16.0em}}} | image = [[File:Dharma Wheel (2).svg|90px|link=Dharmachakra]] | bodystyle = border-collapse:collapse; text-align:center | basestyle = background:#FFD068 | listtitlestyle = padding-bottom:0; | liststyle = padding-top:0; background-color:#FDE7B9; border: 2px solid #FDE7B9 | listclass = hlist | expanded = {{{expanded|{{{1|}}}}}}
| aboveclass = hlist | above = * [[Glossary of Buddhism|Glossary]] * [[Index of Buddhism-related articles|Index]] * [[Outline of Buddhism|Outline]]
<!----------------------- History ------------------------->
| list1name = History | list1title = [[History of Buddhism|History]] | list1 = * [[Timeline of Buddhism|Timeline]] * [[The Buddha]] * [[Pre-sectarian Buddhism]] * [[Buddhist councils|Councils]] * [[Silk Road transmission of Buddhism]] * [[Decline of Buddhism in the Indian subcontinent|Decline in the Indian subcontinent]] * [[List of Buddhists|Later Buddhists]] * [[Buddhist modernism]] <!---------------------- Concepts ------------------------->
| list2name = Concepts | list2title = {{hlist |[[Dharma]] |[[Glossary of Buddhism|Concepts]]}} | list2 = * [[Four Noble Truths]] * [[Noble Eightfold Path]] **[[Dharmachakra|Dharma wheel]] * [[Skandha|Five Aggregates]] * [[Impermanence (Buddhism)|Impermanence]] * [[Duḥkha|Suffering]] * [[Anattā|No-self]] * [[Pratītyasamutpāda|Dependent Origination]] * [[Middle Way]] * [[Maitrī|Mettā]] * [[Śūnyatā|Emptiness]] * [[Buddhist ethics|Morality]] * [[Karma in Buddhism|Karma]] * [[Rebirth (Buddhism)|Rebirth]] * [[Saṃsāra (Buddhism)|Saṃsāra]] * [[Buddhist cosmology|Cosmology]]
<!---------------------- Texts ------------------------>
| list3name = Texts | list3title = [[Buddhist texts]] | list3 = * [[Buddhavacana]] * [[Early Buddhist texts|Early Texts]] * [[Tripiṭaka]] * [[Mahayana sutras|Mahayana Sutras]] * [[Pali Canon|Pāli Canon]] * [[Sanskrit Buddhist literature|Sanskrit literature]] * [[Tibetan Buddhist canon|Tibetan canon]] * [[Chinese Buddhist canon|Chinese canon]] * [[Post-canonical Buddhist texts|Post-canon]]
<!---------------------- Practices ------------------------>
| list4name = Practices | list4title = [[Threefold Training|Practices]] | list4 = * [[Refuge in Buddhism|Three Jewels]] * [[Buddhist paths to liberation]] * [[Five precepts]] * [[Pāramitā|Perfections]] * [[Buddhist meditation|Meditation]] * [[Buddhist philosophy|Philosophical reasoning]] * [[Buddhist devotion|Devotional practices]] * [[Merit (Buddhism)|Merit making]] * [[Anussati|Recollections]] * [[Sati (Buddhism)|Mindfulness]] * [[Prajñā (Buddhism)|Wisdom]] * [[Brahmavihara|Sublime abidings]] * [[Bodhipakkhiyādhammā|Aids to Enlightenment]] * [[Buddhist monasticism|Monasticism]] * [[Householder (Buddhism)|Lay life]] * [[Buddhist music|Buddhist chant]] * [[Buddhist pilgrimage sites|Pilgrimage]] * [[Buddhist vegetarianism|Vegetarianism]] <!----------------------- Soteriology ------------------------->
| list5name = Nirvana | list5title = [[Nirvana (Buddhism)|Nirvāṇa]] | list5 = * [[Enlightenment in Buddhism|Awakening]] * [[Fruits of the noble path|Four Stages]] * [[Arhat]] * [[Pratyekabuddhayāna]] * [[Bodhisattva]] * [[Buddhahood|Buddha]]
<!--------------------- Traditions ------------------------>
| list6name = Traditions | list6title = [[Schools of Buddhism|Traditions]] | list6 = * [[Theravada|Theravāda]] * [[Pali Canon|Pāli]] * [[Mahayana|Mahāyāna]] * [[Hinayana]] * [[Chinese Buddhism|Chinese]] * [[Vajrayana|Vajrayāna]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism|Tibetan]] * [[Navayana]] * [[Newar Buddhism|Newar]]
<!--------------------- Countries ------------------------>
| list7name = Countries | list7title = [[Buddhism by country]] | list7 = * [[Buddhism in Bhutan|Bhutan]] * [[Buddhism in Brazil|Brazil]] * [[Buddhism in Cambodia|Cambodia]] * [[Buddhism in China|China]] * [[History of Buddhism in India|India]] * [[Buddhism in Indonesia|Indonesia]] * [[Buddhism in Japan|Japan]] * [[Korean Buddhism|Korea]] * [[Buddhism in Laos|Laos]] * [[Buddhism in Malaysia|Malaysia]] * [[Buddhism in Mongolia|Mongolia]] * [[Buddhism in Myanmar|Myanmar]] * [[Buddhism in New Zealand|New Zealand]] * [[Buddhism in Russia|Russia]] * [[Buddhism in Singapore|Singapore]] * [[Buddhism in the United States|US]] * [[Buddhism in Sri Lanka|Sri Lanka]] * [[Buddhism in Taiwan|Taiwan]] * [[Buddhism in Thailand|Thailand]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism|Tibet]] * [[Buddhism in Vietnam|Vietnam]]
| belowclass = hlist | below = * {{Portal-inline|Buddhism|size=tiny}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!---Place category links on the /doc sub-page; language links go to Wikidata, thank you!--->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Sidebar with collapsible lists | name = Buddhism | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:Buddhism|a series]] on | title = [[Buddhism]] | width = {{{width|16.0em}}} | image = [[File:Dharma Wheel (2).svg|90px|link=Dharmachakra]] | bodystyle = border-collapse:collapse; text-align:center | basestyle = background:#FFD068 | listtitlestyle = padding-bottom:0; | liststyle = padding-top:0; background-color:#FDE7B9; border: 2px solid #FDE7B9 | listclass = hlist | expanded = {{{expanded|{{{1|}}}}}}
| aboveclass = hlist | above = * [[Glossary of Buddhism|Glossary]] * [[Index of Buddhism-related articles|Index]] * [[Outline of Buddhism|Outline]]
<!----------------------- History ------------------------->
| list1name = History | list1title = [[History of Buddhism|History]] | list1 = * [[Timeline of Buddhism|Timeline]] * [[The Buddha]] * [[Pre-sectarian Buddhism]] * [[Buddhist councils|Councils]] * [[Silk Road transmission of Buddhism]] * [[Decline of Buddhism in the Indian subcontinent|Decline in the Indian subcontinent]] * [[List of Buddhists|Later Buddhists]] * [[Buddhist modernism]] <!---------------------- Concepts ------------------------->
| list2name = Concepts | list2title = {{hlist |[[Dharma]] |[[Glossary of Buddhism|Concepts]]}} | list2 = * [[Four Noble Truths]] * [[Noble Eightfold Path]] **[[Dharmachakra|Dharma wheel]] * [[Skandha|Five Aggregates]] * [[Impermanence (Buddhism)|Impermanence]] * [[Duḥkha|Suffering]] * [[Anattā|No-self]] * [[Pratītyasamutpāda|Dependent Origination]] * [[Middle Way]] * [[Maitrī|Mettā]] * [[Śūnyatā|Emptiness]] * [[Buddhist ethics|Morality]] * [[Karma in Buddhism|Karma]] * [[Rebirth (Buddhism)|Rebirth]] * [[Saṃsāra (Buddhism)|Saṃsāra]] * [[Buddhist cosmology|Cosmology]]
<!---------------------- Texts ------------------------>
| list3name = Texts | list3title = [[Buddhist texts]] | list3 = * [[Buddhavacana]] * [[Early Buddhist texts|Early Texts]] * [[Tripiṭaka]] * [[Mahayana sutras|Mahayana Sutras]] * [[Pali Canon|Pāli Canon]] * [[Sanskrit Buddhist literature|Sanskrit literature]] * [[Tibetan Buddhist canon|Tibetan canon]] * [[Chinese Buddhist canon|Chinese canon]] * [[Post-canonical Buddhist texts|Post-canon]]
<!---------------------- Practices ------------------------>
| list4name = Practices | list4title = [[Threefold Training|Practices]] | list4 = * [[Refuge in Buddhism|Three Jewels]] * [[Buddhist paths to liberation]] * [[Five precepts]] * [[Pāramitā|Perfections]] * [[Buddhist meditation|Meditation]] * [[Buddhist philosophy|Philosophical reasoning]] * [[Buddhist devotion|Devotional practices]] * [[Merit (Buddhism)|Merit making]] * [[Anussati|Recollections]] * [[Sati (Buddhism)|Mindfulness]] * [[Prajñā (Buddhism)|Wisdom]] * [[Brahmavihara|Sublime abidings]] * [[Bodhipakkhiyādhammā|Aids to Enlightenment]] * [[Buddhist monasticism|Monasticism]] * [[Householder (Buddhism)|Lay life]] * [[Buddhist music|Buddhist chant]] * [[Buddhist pilgrimage sites|Pilgrimage]] * [[Buddhist vegetarianism|Vegetarianism]] <!----------------------- Soteriology ------------------------->
| list5name = Nirvana | list5title = [[Nirvana (Buddhism)|Nirvāṇa]] | list5 = * [[Enlightenment in Buddhism|Awakening]] * [[Fruits of the noble path|Four Stages]] * [[Arhat]] * [[Pratyekabuddhayāna]] * [[Bodhisattva]] * [[Buddhahood|Buddha]]
<!--------------------- Traditions ------------------------>
| list6name = Traditions | list6title = [[Schools of Buddhism|Traditions]] | list6 = * [[Theravada|Theravāda]] * [[Pali Canon|Pāli]] * [[Mahayana|Mahāyāna]] * [[Hinayana]] * [[Chinese Buddhism|Chinese]] * [[Vajrayana|Vajrayāna]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism|Tibetan]] * [[Navayana]] * [[Newar Buddhism|Newar]]
<!--------------------- Countries ------------------------>
| list7name = Countries | list7title = [[Buddhism by country]] | list7 = * [[Buddhism in Bhutan|Bhutan]] * [[Buddhism in Brazil|Brazil]] * [[Buddhism in Cambodia|Cambodia]] * [[Buddhism in China|China]] * [[History of Buddhism in India|India]] * [[Buddhism in Indonesia|Indonesia]] * [[Buddhism in Japan|Japan]] * [[Korean Buddhism|Korea]] * [[Buddhism in Laos|Laos]] * [[Buddhism in Malaysia|Malaysia]] * [[Buddhism in Mongolia|Mongolia]] * [[Buddhism in Myanmar|Myanmar]] * [[Buddhism in New Zealand|New Zealand]] * [[Buddhism in Russia|Russia]] * [[Buddhism in Singapore|Singapore]] * [[Buddhism in the United States|US]] * [[Buddhism in Sri Lanka|Sri Lanka]] * [[Buddhism in Taiwan|Taiwan]] * [[Buddhism in Thailand|Thailand]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism|Tibet]] * [[Buddhism in Vietnam|Vietnam]]
| belowclass = hlist | below = * {{Portal-inline|Buddhism|size=tiny}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!---Place category links on the /doc sub-page; language links go to Wikidata, thank you!--->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<includeonly>{{Sidebar with collapsible lists | name = Buddhism | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:Buddhism|a series]] on | title = [[Buddhism]] | width = {{{width|16.0em}}} | image = [[File:Dharma Wheel (2).svg|90px|link=Dharmachakra]] | bodystyle = border-collapse:collapse; text-align:center | basestyle = background:#FFD068 | listtitlestyle = padding-bottom:0; | liststyle = padding-top:0; background-color:#FDE7B9; border: 2px solid #FDE7B9 | listclass = hlist | expanded = {{{expanded|{{{1|}}}}}}
| aboveclass = hlist | above = * [[Glossary of Buddhism|Glossary]] * [[Index of Buddhism-related articles|Index]] * [[Outline of Buddhism|Outline]]
<!----------------------- History ------------------------->
| list1name = History | list1title = [[History of Buddhism|History]] | list1 = * [[Timeline of Buddhism|Timeline]] * [[The Buddha]] * [[Pre-sectarian Buddhism]] * [[Buddhist councils|Councils]] * [[Silk Road transmission of Buddhism]] * [[Decline of Buddhism in the Indian subcontinent|Decline in the Indian subcontinent]] * [[List of Buddhists|Later Buddhists]] * [[Buddhist modernism]] <!---------------------- Concepts ------------------------->
| list2name = Concepts | list2title = {{hlist |[[Dharma]] |[[Glossary of Buddhism|Concepts]]}} | list2 = * [[Four Noble Truths]] * [[Noble Eightfold Path]] **[[Dharmachakra|Dharma wheel]] * [[Skandha|Five Aggregates]] * [[Impermanence (Buddhism)|Impermanence]] * [[Duḥkha|Suffering]] * [[Anattā|No-self]] * [[Pratītyasamutpāda|Dependent Origination]] * [[Middle Way]] * [[Maitrī|Mettā]] * [[Śūnyatā|Emptiness]] * [[Buddhist ethics|Morality]] * [[Karma in Buddhism|Karma]] * [[Rebirth (Buddhism)|Rebirth]] * [[Saṃsāra (Buddhism)|Saṃsāra]] * [[Buddhist cosmology|Cosmology]]
<!---------------------- Texts ------------------------>
| list3name = Texts | list3title = [[Buddhist texts]] | list3 = * [[Buddhavacana]] * [[Early Buddhist texts|Early Texts]] * [[Tripiṭaka]] * [[Mahayana sutras|Mahayana Sutras]] * [[Pali Canon|Pāli Canon]] * [[Sanskrit Buddhist literature|Sanskrit literature]] * [[Tibetan Buddhist canon|Tibetan canon]] * [[Chinese Buddhist canon|Chinese canon]] * [[Post-canonical Buddhist texts|Post-canon]]
<!---------------------- Practices ------------------------>
| list4name = Practices | list4title = [[Threefold Training|Practices]] | list4 = * [[Refuge in Buddhism|Three Jewels]] * [[Buddhist paths to liberation]] * [[Five precepts]] * [[Pāramitā|Perfections]] * [[Buddhist meditation|Meditation]] * [[Buddhist philosophy|Philosophical reasoning]] * [[Buddhist devotion|Devotional practices]] * [[Merit (Buddhism)|Merit making]] * [[Anussati|Recollections]] * [[Sati (Buddhism)|Mindfulness]] * [[Prajñā (Buddhism)|Wisdom]] * [[Brahmavihara|Sublime abidings]] * [[Bodhipakkhiyādhammā|Aids to Enlightenment]] * [[Buddhist monasticism|Monasticism]] * [[Householder (Buddhism)|Lay life]] * [[Buddhist music|Buddhist chant]] * [[Buddhist pilgrimage sites|Pilgrimage]] * [[Buddhist vegetarianism|Vegetarianism]] <!----------------------- Soteriology ------------------------->
| list5name = Nirvana | list5title = [[Nirvana (Buddhism)|Nirvāṇa]] | list5 = * [[Enlightenment in Buddhism|Awakening]] * [[Fruits of the noble path|Four Stages]] * [[Arhat]] * [[Pratyekabuddhayāna]] * [[Bodhisattva]] * [[Buddhahood|Buddha]]
<!--------------------- Traditions ------------------------>
| list6name = Traditions | list6title = [[Schools of Buddhism|Traditions]] | list6 = * [[Theravada|Theravāda]] * [[Pali Canon|Pāli]] * [[Mahayana|Mahāyāna]] * [[Hinayana]] * [[Chinese Buddhism|Chinese]] * [[Vajrayana|Vajrayāna]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism|Tibetan]] * [[Navayana]] * [[Newar Buddhism|Newar]]
<!--------------------- Countries ------------------------>
| list7name = Countries | list7title = [[Buddhism by country]] | list7 = * [[Buddhism in Bhutan|Bhutan]] * [[Buddhism in Brazil|Brazil]] * [[Buddhism in Cambodia|Cambodia]] * [[Buddhism in China|China]] * [[History of Buddhism in India|India]] * [[Buddhism in Indonesia|Indonesia]] * [[Buddhism in Japan|Japan]] * [[Korean Buddhism|Korea]] * [[Buddhism in Laos|Laos]] * [[Buddhism in Malaysia|Malaysia]] * [[Buddhism in Mongolia|Mongolia]] * [[Buddhism in Myanmar|Myanmar]] * [[Buddhism in New Zealand|New Zealand]] * [[Buddhism in Russia|Russia]] * [[Buddhism in Singapore|Singapore]] * [[Buddhism in the United States|US]] * [[Buddhism in Sri Lanka|Sri Lanka]] * [[Buddhism in Taiwan|Taiwan]] * [[Buddhism in Thailand|Thailand]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism|Tibet]] * [[Buddhism in Vietnam|Vietnam]]
| belowclass = hlist | below = * {{Portal-inline|Buddhism|size=tiny}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!---Place category links on the /doc sub-page; language links go to Wikidata, thank you!--->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Buddhism here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Buddhism for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <includeonly>{{Sidebar with collapsible lists | name = Buddhism | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:Buddhism|a series]] on | title = [[Buddhism]] | width = {{{width|16.0em}}} | image = [[File:Dharma Wheel (2).svg|90px|link=Dharmachakra]] | bodystyle = border-collapse:collapse; text-align:center | basestyle = background:#FFD068 | listtitlestyle = padding-bottom:0; | liststyle = padding-top:0; background-color:#FDE7B9; border: 2px solid #FDE7B9 | listclass = hlist | expanded = {{{expanded|{{{1|}}}}}}
| aboveclass = hlist | above = * [[Glossary of Buddhism|Glossary]] * [[Index of Buddhism-related articles|Index]] * [[Outline of Buddhism|Outline]]
<!----------------------- History ------------------------->
| list1name = History | list1title = [[History of Buddhism|History]] | list1 = * [[Timeline of Buddhism|Timeline]] * [[The Buddha]] * [[Pre-sectarian Buddhism]] * [[Buddhist councils|Councils]] * [[Silk Road transmission of Buddhism]] * [[Decline of Buddhism in the Indian subcontinent|Decline in the Indian subcontinent]] * [[List of Buddhists|Later Buddhists]] * [[Buddhist modernism]] <!---------------------- Concepts ------------------------->
| list2name = Concepts | list2title = {{hlist |[[Dharma]] |[[Glossary of Buddhism|Concepts]]}} | list2 = * [[Four Noble Truths]] * [[Noble Eightfold Path]] **[[Dharmachakra|Dharma wheel]] * [[Skandha|Five Aggregates]] * [[Impermanence (Buddhism)|Impermanence]] * [[Duḥkha|Suffering]] * [[Anattā|No-self]] * [[Pratītyasamutpāda|Dependent Origination]] * [[Middle Way]] * [[Maitrī|Mettā]] * [[Śūnyatā|Emptiness]] * [[Buddhist ethics|Morality]] * [[Karma in Buddhism|Karma]] * [[Rebirth (Buddhism)|Rebirth]] * [[Saṃsāra (Buddhism)|Saṃsāra]] * [[Buddhist cosmology|Cosmology]]
<!---------------------- Texts ------------------------>
| list3name = Texts | list3title = [[Buddhist texts]] | list3 = * [[Buddhavacana]] * [[Early Buddhist texts|Early Texts]] * [[Tripiṭaka]] * [[Mahayana sutras|Mahayana Sutras]] * [[Pali Canon|Pāli Canon]] * [[Sanskrit Buddhist literature|Sanskrit literature]] * [[Tibetan Buddhist canon|Tibetan canon]] * [[Chinese Buddhist canon|Chinese canon]] * [[Post-canonical Buddhist texts|Post-canon]]
<!---------------------- Practices ------------------------>
| list4name = Practices | list4title = [[Threefold Training|Practices]] | list4 = * [[Refuge in Buddhism|Three Jewels]] * [[Buddhist paths to liberation]] * [[Five precepts]] * [[Pāramitā|Perfections]] * [[Buddhist meditation|Meditation]] * [[Buddhist philosophy|Philosophical reasoning]] * [[Buddhist devotion|Devotional practices]] * [[Merit (Buddhism)|Merit making]] * [[Anussati|Recollections]] * [[Sati (Buddhism)|Mindfulness]] * [[Prajñā (Buddhism)|Wisdom]] * [[Brahmavihara|Sublime abidings]] * [[Bodhipakkhiyādhammā|Aids to Enlightenment]] * [[Buddhist monasticism|Monasticism]] * [[Householder (Buddhism)|Lay life]] * [[Buddhist music|Buddhist chant]] * [[Buddhist pilgrimage sites|Pilgrimage]] * [[Buddhist vegetarianism|Vegetarianism]] <!----------------------- Soteriology ------------------------->
| list5name = Nirvana | list5title = [[Nirvana (Buddhism)|Nirvāṇa]] | list5 = * [[Enlightenment in Buddhism|Awakening]] * [[Fruits of the noble path|Four Stages]] * [[Arhat]] * [[Pratyekabuddhayāna]] * [[Bodhisattva]] * [[Buddhahood|Buddha]]
<!--------------------- Traditions ------------------------>
| list6name = Traditions | list6title = [[Schools of Buddhism|Traditions]] | list6 = * [[Theravada|Theravāda]] * [[Pali Canon|Pāli]] * [[Mahayana|Mahāyāna]] * [[Hinayana]] * [[Chinese Buddhism|Chinese]] * [[Vajrayana|Vajrayāna]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism|Tibetan]] * [[Navayana]] * [[Newar Buddhism|Newar]]
<!--------------------- Countries ------------------------>
| list7name = Countries | list7title = [[Buddhism by country]] | list7 = * [[Buddhism in Bhutan|Bhutan]] * [[Buddhism in Brazil|Brazil]] * [[Buddhism in Cambodia|Cambodia]] * [[Buddhism in China|China]] * [[History of Buddhism in India|India]] * [[Buddhism in Indonesia|Indonesia]] * [[Buddhism in Japan|Japan]] * [[Korean Buddhism|Korea]] * [[Buddhism in Laos|Laos]] * [[Buddhism in Malaysia|Malaysia]] * [[Buddhism in Mongolia|Mongolia]] * [[Buddhism in Myanmar|Myanmar]] * [[Buddhism in New Zealand|New Zealand]] * [[Buddhism in Russia|Russia]] * [[Buddhism in Singapore|Singapore]] * [[Buddhism in the United States|US]] * [[Buddhism in Sri Lanka|Sri Lanka]] * [[Buddhism in Taiwan|Taiwan]] * [[Buddhism in Thailand|Thailand]] * [[Tibetan Buddhism|Tibet]] * [[Buddhism in Vietnam|Vietnam]]
| belowclass = hlist | below = * {{Portal-inline|Buddhism|size=tiny}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!---Place category links on the /doc sub-page; language links go to Wikidata, thank you!--->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
